summary: Completed testing of 3 new features: 1) Export PNG for Mindmap (html2canvas), 2) Enhanced Brand Tracking with Timeline/Comparativo/Historico tabs, 3) Advanced Collaboration module with Approvals/Comments/Activity Log. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals returns approvals list and counts (pending, approved, rejected, changes_requested)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals creates approval with status='pending'
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals/{id}/action with action='approve' works - status becomes 'approved'
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals/{id}/action with action='reject' works - status becomes 'rejected'
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals/{id}/action with action='request_changes' works - status becomes 'changes_requested'
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/activity returns activity log with activities array
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/comments creates comment with comment_id, user_id, content
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/comments returns comments list with total count
Backend: DELETE /api/brands/{brand_id}/comments/{id} removes own comment successfully
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/tracking/history returns snapshots array with has_data flag
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/tracking/comparison returns current metrics, previous, and changes
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/tracking/snapshot creates manual snapshot with type='manual'
Backend: Created snapshot appears in tracking history (verified persistence)
Frontend: Collaboration page loads with data-testid='collaboration-page'
Frontend: Collaboration tabs exist - Aprovacoes (tab-approvals), Comentarios (tab-comments), Atividades (tab-activity)
Frontend: New Approval dialog opens with type select (approval-type-select), name input (approval-name-input), submit button (submit-approval-btn)
Frontend: Brand Tracking page loads with data-testid='brand-tracking-page'
Frontend: Brand Tracking tabs exist - Timeline (tab-timeline), Comparativo (tab-compare), Historico (tab-history)
Frontend: Create Snapshot button exists with data-testid='create-snapshot-btn'
Frontend: Mindmap page has Export PNG button with data-testid='export-mindmap-btn' and text 'Exportar PNG'
Frontend: Colaboracao sidebar link exists under Gestao section in Layout.js
critical_code_review_comments: collaboration.py: Approvals workflow correctly implements pending→approved/rejected/changes_requested status flow with history tracking
collaboration.py: Activity log automatically records approval actions (approval_created, approval_approve, etc)
collaboration.py: Comments endpoint correctly handles user_id ownership for delete operation
brand_tracking.py: Tracking comparison generates current scores from collect_current_scores() when <2 snapshots exist
brand_tracking.py: Snapshots correctly capture brand_score, brand_equity, maturity_score, pillar_completion, touchpoints_count, crm_contacts
Collaboration.js: STATUS_CONFIG correctly maps pending/approved/rejected/changes_requested to UI colors and icons
BrandTracking.js: METRIC_LABELS and METRIC_COLORS provide consistent visualization across Timeline, Comparativo tabs
BrandMindmap.js: Export PNG uses html2canvas with scale:2 for high quality output, correctly targets [data-testid='mindmap-canvas']
Layout.js: Colaboracao link correctly added at line 148 under 'gestao' section with href='/collaboration'
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed approvals and comments during testing. Comments cleaned up via DELETE endpoint. Approvals remain (no delete endpoint exposed).

export_png_mindmap.details: Export PNG button exists on Mindmap page (data-testid='export-mindmap-btn'), uses html2canvas to capture mindmap canvas

brand_tracking_timeline.details: Timeline tab (tab-timeline) shows visual timeline of brand evolution with snapshot dates and score changes

brand_tracking_comparativo.details: Comparativo tab (tab-compare) allows side-by-side comparison of two snapshots with Antes/Depois visualization

brand_tracking_historico.details: Historico tab (tab-history) lists all snapshots with dates and key metrics

brand_tracking_snapshot.details: Create Snapshot button (create-snapshot-btn) creates manual snapshot capturing all current brand metrics

collaboration_approvals.details: Approvals CRUD with full workflow: create pending → approve/reject/request_changes with comment history

collaboration_comments.details: Comments CRUD: create, list, delete own comments with user attribution

collaboration_activity_log.details: Activity log automatically tracks approval actions and comments

collaboration_sidebar_link.details: Colaboracao link exists in sidebar under Gestao section (href='/collaboration')

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully tested and working: 1) Export PNG on Mindmap page uses html2canvas, 2) Brand Tracking enhanced with Timeline/Comparativo/Historico tabs plus snapshot creation, 3) Collaboration module has full Approvals workflow, Comments CRUD, and Activity Log. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_collaboration_tracking.py covers all endpoints. All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes.
